en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 67

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 67
Top Question of the Week
What’s the next great wave in NFTs and web3?
Instructible prints, apparel and renewables.
It’s all about the actual use of NFTs and web3 IRL and in the open metaverse.

This is why there is such a strong focus on continued build out, in this bear and beyond, of web3 mapping features, IRL production co-ops, flexible + rechargeable memberships, and everything that helps us bridge more people between inflation adjusted IRL activities and virtual means to seize the memes of production.
Most Common Repeat Question
Why does everything always start to look the same with all of these corporate web2 fashion clones of each other?

Besides having no incentive and no imagination, let’s be real, their top goal is to “woo the kids” without being caught up in what horrible machine of perpetual surveillance, ad targeting and monoculture they’re wooing everyone into being trapped in dull grey amber within.

There’s something to be said about them simply choosing the least expensive, least effortful and most ubiquitous path as enterprise orientated software has eaten design. But that only holds true for as long as content monetisation remains closed.
Thankfully, everyone in the know in web3 is racing towards greater build out of truly open content monetisation methods for designers and creators of all kinds.
Top Controversies

Is it really that much of a surprise that the self-proclaimed populariser responsible for utility entering the NFT conversation (And might as well have claimed to have invented the internet whilst at it) shilled the fuck out of The Saudis drop and dumped directly back on his followers within hours.
If you’ve been in NFTs longer than a few minutes, or February 2021, then no surprise at all.
Silly Fails and Trolling

Was it one huge troll all along to distract from everything else going wrong? At this stage, it seems more plausible than pulling out because of bots. But, here’s hoping for the best so crypto twitter remains a great place to be until all of web2 social media is soon replaced by true web3 so we never have to hear another word about web5 or Elon’s latest kids again 🤣
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 67

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 67
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
What’s ال next great wave في NFTs و web3?
Instructible prints, apparel و renewables.
It’s all about ال actual use من NFTs و web3 IRL و في ال open metaverse.

This is ليه there is such a strong focus على continued build out, في this bear و beyond, من web3 mapping features, IRL production co-ops, flexible + rechargeable memberships, و everything that helps us bridge more people between inflation adjusted IRL activities و virtual means الى seize ال memes من production.
Most Common Repeat سؤال
ليه does everything always start الى look ال same مع all من these corporate web2 فاشون clones من each other?

Besides having no incentive و no imagination, let’s be real, their top goal is الى “woo ال kids” without being caught up في what horrible machine من perpetual surveillance, ad targeting و monoculture they’re wooing everyone into being trapped في dull grey amber within.

There’s something الى be said about them simply choosing ال least expensive, least effortful و most ubiquitous path as enterprise orientated software has eaten design. But that only holds true لـ as long as content monetisation remains closed.
Thankfully, everyone في ال know في web3 is racing towards greater build out من truly open content monetisation methods لـ designers و creators من all kinds.
أهم الجدل

Is it really that much من a surprise that ال self-proclaimed populariser responsible لـ utility entering ال NFT conversation (و might as well have claimed الى have invented ال internet whilst at it) shilled ال fuck out من ال Saudis drop و dumped directly back على his followers within hours.
If you’ve been في NFTs longer than a few minutes, or February 2021, then no surprise at all.
Silly Fails و Trolling

Was it one huge troll all along الى distract من everything else going wrong? At this stage, it seems more plausible than pulling out because من bots. But, here’s hoping لـ ال best so crypto twitter remains a great place الى be until all من web2 سوشيال media is soon replaced by true web3 so we never have الى hear another word about web5 or Elon’s latest kids again 🤣
